name: 4ditor
highlights: Full-stack Rails 8 SaaS platform automating photo editing and video content creation for real estate professionals
Automated video generation engine transforming property images into dynamic video slideshows using AI
Scheduling system for regular, automated video creation based on brand settings and video templates
Multi-stage review and approval workflow for video elements ensuring user control
Team accounts with multiple properties per account support
Stripe billing, subscriptions, and metered usage support
Deployed on Cloudflare with static marketing pages and an app backend

name: Autohaven
description: Community + newsletter platform for automotive audiences
highlights: Built community features, posting, and discovery workflows
Shipped AI assistants and content tools for faster publishing
Added newsletter tooling and programmatic SEO pages
